tasks.label: Swift: Build ResizeMe
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/ResizeMeMac && xcodebuild -project ResizeMe.xcodeproj -scheme ResizeMe -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath .derivedData build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='-'

tasks.label: Swift: Run ResizeMe
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/ResizeMeMac && rm -rf .derivedData && xcodebuild -project ResizeMe.xcodeproj -scheme ResizeMe -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath .derivedData build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='-' && open .derivedData/Build/Products/Debug/ResizeMe.app
